details: The agent ran kubectl commands against the cluster and correctly identified both required elements: (1) the rollout is stuck with Progressing=False and reason ProgressDeadlineExceeded, and (2) the root cause is the non-existent image 'nginx:2.0-does-not-exist' causing ErrImagePull/ImagePullBackOff on the new v2 pod. The agent also correctly explained why v1 pods are still serving traffic — the rolling update strategy prevents scaling down healthy old pods when the new pod fails to become ready.
